qa_pair.question: In the illustrative child screening profile, what body weight in kilograms is used?
How many commodities are present in the public v1 dietary taxonomy manifest?
What default processing factor value is published in the v1 core defaults?
Which commodity code in the public taxonomy is marked as reviewed rather than curated?
For the adult chronic benchmark case, what is the expected total intake in mg/kg-bw/day?
For the child acute bounded benchmark case, what is the expected upper-bound intake in mg/kg-bw/day?
What status does the generated v0.1.0 readiness report currently declare?
How many release gates are listed in the generated v0.1.0 readiness report?
Which validation artifact documents deferred taxonomy limitations at release time?
What schedule label is exported for acute PBPK oral input bundles?
